name: Live & Let Live (LGBTQ)
notes:
· · ·
Live & Let Live is an open discussion meeting of Alcoholics Anonymous designed as a safe space for members of the LGBTQ+ community and welcoming of allies. Members bring a topic or we read from the Daily Reflections. Monthly and yearly sober anniversaries are celebrated.
